_comment: Scope for 30__analysis/39__external_benchmark_check.py — cross-checks our published valuation metrics against yfinance for a sample of tickers, to catch calculation bugs (e.g. the MLI split-lag bug, #235) rather than relying on someone noticing by chance. Edit this file (no code change) to grow/shrink coverage or add/remove metrics.
_comment_always_check: Tickers always included every run regardless of the rotating sample — known regressions + high-scrutiny names.
_comment_metrics: comparison_class distinguishes VALID methodological divergence from a genuine error — see the discussion on issue #236. 'should_match_live': our metric is deliberately priced off TODAY's close (23__intrinsic_value.py's TTM live path), same as the yfinance field — divergence beyond tolerance is a real bug signal. 'methodology_different': our metric is deliberately priced at the FY period_end close (market_cap_asof's fiscal-close design, documented in web/templates/help.html) — logged for trend visibility only, NEVER flagged as a bug no matter how far it diverges from a live source.
